title: Reset Device - Clear Trusted Devices - Clear - No
scenario: Verify that tapping "No" on the confirmation popup cancels the "Clear Trusted Devices" action and keeps the headset connected.
steps: Start Lens App with a headset connected.
Tap the "Clear" button next to "Clear Trusted Devices".
expected: The popup closes, the headset is not cleared, the Reset Device tab remains open, and the headset stays connected.
